rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no bearing on the one-year limitations periods for malicious prosecution, libel, slander, or tax-sale challenges in Civ. Prac. & Rem. Code §16.002.
quote: A person must bring suit for malicious prosecution, libel, slander, or breach of promise of marriage not later than one year after the day the cause of action accrues.
_note: No overlap between proposed change and this limitations statute.
